creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
I think this change should come with a few other things in the one commit:
- update graphics/gphoto2 to 2.5.15 (which was released at the same time as libgphoto 2.5.15, and does not yet have a 2.5.16).
http://www.gphoto.org/news/
- I often like to update graphics/py-gphoto2 to the latest version at the same time (currently 1.8.1), although I don’t think it is strictly necessary in this case.
- bump PORTREVISION of dependent ports, and ensure they all continue to build successfully with the update.

Dependent ports according to https://www.freshports.org/graphics/libgphoto2/:
devel/gvfs
graphics/camera
graphics/camerakit
graphics/darktable
graphics/digikam-kde4
graphics/entangle
graphics/eos-movrec
graphics/flphoto
graphics/fusefs-gphotofs
graphics/gphoto2
graphics/gtimelapse
graphics/gtkam
graphics/kamera-kde4
graphics/py-gphoto2
graphics/rawstudio
graphics/shotwell
